content:
I need to multiply 697 × 983 in base 11.

First, let me convert these numbers to base 10, multiply, then convert back to base 11.

697₁₁ to base 10:
6×11² + 9×11¹ + 7×11⁰ = 6×121 + 9×11 + 7×1 = 726 + 99 + 7 = 832₁₀

983₁₁ to base 10:
9×11² + 8×11¹ + 3×11⁰ = 9×121 + 8×11 + 3×1 = 1089 + 88 + 3 = 1180₁₀

Multiply in base 10:
832 × 1180 = 981,760₁₀

Convert 981,760₁₀ to base 11:
981,760 ÷ 11 = 89,250 remainder 10 (A)
89,250 ÷ 11 = 8,113 remainder 7
8,113 ÷ 11 = 737 remainder 6
737 ÷ 11 = 67 remainder 0
67 ÷ 11 = 6 remainder 1
6 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 6

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 61067A₁₁

61067A
